pending.message: Thank you Ken for all his effort supporting AINCHORS for one month. Angie wants to ask: Are you still interested in helping her deliver training in Australia in the coming months? If yes, Angie will send over a training contract.
pending.ariaNote: Angie asked me to relay this — she's planning training delivery in Australia over the next few months and wants to know if Ken is interested before sending a formal contract.

pending.message: Angie asked me to arrange a meeting with you tomorrow (Thu 4 June) at 11am Sydney time, 1 hour, Google Meet. Unfortunately my Google Calendar auth has expired so I couldn't create it directly. Could you please set it up on your end? Also, Angie says to nudge: calendar auth needs re-doing on her machine (gog auth add angie.foong@ainchors.com --services calendar).
